differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae infection with endogenous endophthalmitis and metastatic abscesses
Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Histoplasmosis, Cryptococcosis, or Aspergillosis)
next_steps: Ophthalmology consultation for emergent pars plana vitrectomy and intraocular fluid sampling
Aspiration and microbiological culture of hepatic abscess
Microbiological culture of sputum and blood, specifically checking for K. pneumoniae mucoviscosity (string test)
Systemic antibiotic therapy adjustment based on microbiologic sensitivities
Continue systemic antifungal therapy pending diagnostic results
Review of serum and urine for K. pneumoniae serotype K1 or K2 antigen
